taskResults.notes: Repeatable --checks flag on verify-removal via Commander accumulator (collectChecks); VerifyRemovalOptions.checks now string[]; opts.checks?.length ? opts.checks : undefined preserves the default-omitted path.
Same repeatable --checks fix applied to fix --verify; FixOptions.checks now string[], reusing collectChecks.

Added AC-1/AC-2 tests to test/cli-verify-removal.test.ts (repeated flags, comma passthrough) and new test/cli-fix.test.ts for AC-4 (fix had no prior CLI-level test file). Verified each test correctly RED under the old last-flag-wins/comma-split behavior before implementing the fix. Full suite: 439 passed, 6 skipped.
